spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 3 of 3 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles several edge cases (errors, fallbacks, feature detection, denials) — not just the happy path.

references.rationale: Concept page includes a references section with the canonical chromestatus.com/feature/5159559872249856 link and the JS Self-Profiling specification.

design_system.rationale: Current page uses shared CSS variables for local styling; no raw hex colours or inline style attributes were found.

summary: DevTools MCP verification refreshed the concept after adding the required ChromeStatus reference link. The worker support card now updates from the actual Dedicated Worker probe instead of inferring support from the main thread, and the stale raw-hex design-system finding no longer reproduces in the current file.
